calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235.

Sally Noma, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Saint Francis Memorial Hospital, a Califronia corp.

Plaintiff's Witness Eddie Kwan was sworn and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff, and against the Defaulted Defendants MCT Assoc, Inc., a Delaware corp. dba Bright Minds Institure, aka MGT Incorp. a Delaware corp., dba Bright Minds Institure for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $419,951.67
Prejudgment Interest - $7,771.29
Attorney fees $6,063.50
Costs - $455.00
Total judgment in the amount of $434,241.46

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Continued To Aug-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
